title: calibrachoa scabridula
intro: Calibrachoa scabridula, a species of flowering plant in the evening primrose family (Onagraceae), is native to South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Calibrachoa scabridula are thought to include antioxidant and immune-boosting properties, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. Traditionally, the plant has been prepared for medicinal use through infusions or decoctions, although specific herbal preparations and dosages have not been extensively documented.
